title: Apache Kafka credentials should not be disclosed
description: Apache Kafka is a distributed event streaming platform used for real-time data pipelines and event-driven architectures. Kafka credentials include SASL usernames/passwords, SSL certificates, and API keys for managed Kafka services (Confluent Cloud, MSK, etc.). Exposing credentials allows access to message streams containing sensitive business events and application data.
recommendation: Remove Kafka credentials from source code. Use environment variables or a secrets manager for SASL credentials. For managed Kafka services, rotate API keys immediately in the respective cloud console.
impact: Unauthorized access to Kafka message streams containing financial transactions, user events, application data, and business-critical event logs in real time.

checks.message: Kafka SASL password detected in variable assignment. Kafka SASL credentials authenticate producers and consumers to Kafka brokers. Exposing these credentials allows unauthorized reading of all subscribed Kafka topics (which may contain financial transactions, user PII, and business events), publishing malicious messages to topics, and disrupting event-driven applications. Rotate credentials immediately and audit Kafka consumer group activity.

Confluent Cloud (Managed Kafka) API key detected. Confluent Cloud API keys authenticate access to managed Kafka clusters on Confluent Cloud. Exposing these credentials allows reading and writing to all Kafka topics in the cluster, accessing Schema Registry, and potentially exfiltrating large volumes of streaming business data. Rotate immediately in the Confluent Cloud Console.

Kafka SASL password detected in properties configuration. Kafka properties files with hardcoded SASL passwords expose broker authentication credentials. These credentials allow unauthorized access to all Kafka topics accessible by the authenticated user, including reading sensitive event streams and publishing malicious messages. Remove from configuration files and use external secret injection.
